events.name: Late-fall bloom
events.desc: Spidery yellow flowers appear on bare branches in late fall — one of the last trees to bloom

events.name: Golden fall color
events.desc: Leaves turn rich gold-yellow just as flowers begin to open

events.name: Early spring bloom

events.name: Bright red fruit
events.desc: Glossy cherry-red oval fruits ripen, edible and bird-attracting

events.name: Silver catkins
events.desc: Soft silver catkins emerge on bare branches — a classic early spring sight

events.name: Star magnolia bloom
events.desc: Masses of white star-shaped flowers open on bare branches — first magnolia to bloom

events.name: Saucer magnolia bloom
events.desc: Large pink-and-white saucer-shaped flowers on bare branches, one of spring's most spectacular shows

events.name: Magnolia bloom
events.desc: Large fragrant flowers open before or with the emerging leaves

events.name: Sweetbay magnolia bloom
events.desc: Creamy white lemon-scented flowers bloom over a long season

events.desc: Pale yellow-green tulip-like flowers, subtle but distinctive

events.name: Cucumber-like fruits
events.desc: Cucumber-shaped red-to-pink aggregate fruits are eye-catching in late summer

events.name: Bigleaf magnolia bloom

events.name: Southern magnolia bloom
events.desc: Large fragrant white flowers on an evergreen tree — dramatic all summer

events.name: Spring bloom
events.desc: Clouds of white star-shaped flowers — among the first trees to bloom after the magnolias

events.name: Edible blue-purple berries
events.desc: Sweet blue-purple berries ripen — edible, loved by birds

events.name: Orange-red fall color
events.desc: Leaves turn vibrant orange and red

events.name: Spring bloom
events.desc: White flower clusters on bare branches — one of the earliest to bloom

events.name: Summer berries

events.name: Orange-red fall color
events.desc: Vivid orange-red fall foliage

events.name: Deep-pink bloom

events.name: Brilliant fall color
events.desc: Orange-red fall color comes exceptionally early

events.name: Cascading bloom

events.name: Spring bloom
events.desc: White or pink flowers densely cover the branches — a classic spring display

events.name: White flower clusters
events.desc: Long racemes of small white flowers dangle from branches

events.name: Spring bloom

events.desc: Heart-shaped leaves turn clear yellow

events.desc: Flat clusters of small white flowers

events.desc: Dense clusters of pink or white fragrant flowers

events.desc: Masses of pure white flowers — extremely floriferous
